arabic: وَفِي لَفْظٍ لِمُسْلِمٍ: { كُنَّا نَجْمَعُ مَعَهُ إِذَا زَالَتِ اَلشَّمْسُ, ثُمَّ نَرْجِعُ, نَتَتَبَّعُ اَلْفَيْءَ }   1‏ .‏‏1 ‏- صحيح.‏ رواه مسلم (860)‏ (31)‏.‏

english.narrator: And in a narration of Muslim:
english.text: "We used to offer the Friday prayers with him  when the sun passed the meridian. We would then return and try to find the afternoon shadow.
